summary: Staged the remaining `.control-tower/` operational artifacts, created follow-up commit `93cdca07b6cf480f3ff17da9694103640b051ed3` (`chore: capture rollout operational artifacts`), and pushed `main` to `origin`. work_completed: Reviewed pending repository state on `main` and confirmed only Control Tower operational artifacts were outstanding.

Pushed `main` to `origin` without force and verified the branch is synchronized with the remote.
Verified the working tree is clean after push and that no residual untracked files remain.
